notes: CodificationSection, acts , title II, § 1, ; , title II, § 1, ; , title II, ; , title II, § 201, ; , title II, § 201, , which authorized the Secretary of the Treasury to transfer to constituent organizations of the Federal Security Agency requested amounts from appropriations for traveling expenses and printing and binding, Federal Security Agency, and to retransfer to such appropriations, was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.July 13, 1943, ch. 22157 Stat. 513June 28, 1944, ch. 30258 Stat. 566July 3, 1945, ch. 26359 Stat. 376July 26, 1946, ch. 67260 Stat. 697July 8, 1947, ch. 21061 Stat. 276
